action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Joers, Phelps, Snodgrass, Roe, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Hong, J. Jacobson, Johnson, Kirsch, Madison, Mayadev, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Rivera-Wagner, Sheehan, Sinicki, Spaude, Stroud, Stubbs, Tenorio, Udell, Vining, DeSanto, Goodwin, Subeck and Taylor;
